hero.description: We design AI solutions that work with your existing systems, simplifying operations and boosting efficiency — without the complexity.

engagement.title: A clear engagement
engagement.desc: Discovery → prototype → production. Designed to fit your data, team, and constraints.

about.description: We design AI systems that are understandable, testable, and built for real operations. No magic—just strong engineering and clear scope.

ourStory.title: Our story
ourStory.desc: Founded in 2024, ORFEO AI emerged from a simple realization: the gap between cutting-edge AI research and practical business application was too wide. We exist to bridge that gap.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.desc: Our mission is to democratize access to enterprise-grade artificial intelligence. We believe that AI shouldn't be a black box, but a transparent, powerful lever for growth, efficiency, and human potential.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: We build systems that are accurate, reliable, and rigorously tested.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear explanations over jargon. We explain how models reach outcomes.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: We measure success by measurable operational improvement and ROI.

services.description: Comprehensive AI solutions designed to transform your business operations, from intelligent automation to predictive analytics.

pilot.title: Start with a focused pilot.
pilot.desc: We’ll map the use-case, identify the right data sources, and define success metrics before writing production code.

llmIntegration.title: Enterprise LLM Integration
llmIntegration.desc: Secure, private deployment of large language models fine-tuned on your proprietary data. Turn fragmented knowledge into actionable intelligence.

predictiveEngine.title: Predictive Analytics Engine
predictiveEngine.desc: Machine learning models that forecast demand, identify market anomalies, and optimize resource allocation before the need arises.

autonomousAgents.title: Autonomous Agents
autonomousAgents.desc: Custom AI agents capable of handling complex, multi-step workflows. From customer support triage to automated data entry.

computerVision.title: Computer Vision Systems
computerVision.desc: Real-time visual data processing for quality control, security monitoring, and automated spatial analysis.

dataArchitecture.title: Data Architecture & Pipeline
dataArchitecture.desc: Building the scalable, clean data infrastructure required for high-performance AI integration. Garbage in, garbage out stops here.

securityGovernance.title: AI Security & Governance
securityGovernance.desc: Auditing, red-teaming, and securing AI deployments against prompt injection, data leakage, and adversarial attacks.

llmRAG.title: LLM Apps & RAG
llmRAG.desc: Search, chat, copilots, and knowledge systems that are accurate and explainable.

autonomousAgents.title: Autonomous Agents
autonomousAgents.desc: Multi-step automation that plugs into your tools and follows your rules.

dataPipelines.title: Data Pipelines
dataPipelines.desc: Clean ingestion, labeling, and retrieval pipelines optimized for cost and speed.

predictiveAnalytics.title: Predictive Analytics
predictiveAnalytics.desc: Forecasting and anomaly detection for operations, risk, and growth planning.

securityGovernance.title: Security & Governance
securityGovernance.desc: Evals, guardrails, and access control to keep AI safe in production.

automation.title: Automation
automation.desc: From intake to resolution—reduce manual effort with reliable workflows.

home.trustedBy: Trusted by teams building with AI

work.description: We measure success by outcomes. Here are examples of how AI can improve efficiency, quality, and speed.

logistics.label: Efficiency increase
logistics.title: Global logistics optimization
logistics.desc: Deployed a predictive routing neural network that reduced idle times and fuel consumption across a fleet of 5,000 vehicles.

auditing.label: Anomaly detection
auditing.title: Automated financial auditing
auditing.desc: Replaced manual ledger reviews with a custom LLM pipeline capable of parsing millions of transactions in real-time to flag fraud.

triage.label: Resolution time
triage.title: Intelligent customer triage
triage.desc: Implemented an autonomous agent system that handles 80% of tier-1 support queries without human intervention.

process.description: A transparent delivery flow that keeps scope clear, risk controlled, and outcomes measurable.
process.deliveryTitle: A delivery process you can trust
process.deliveryDescription: A clear workflow that keeps scope tight, quality measurable, and production risk controlled.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.desc: Define the use-case, success metrics, data sources, and constraints. We align on scope and risks before building.

prototype.title: Prototype
prototype.desc: Ship a pilot on real workflows. We validate quality, cost, and adoption signals with an evaluation baseline.

production.title: Production
production.desc: Harden the system with guardrails, monitoring, and access control. Make behavior consistent and auditable.

scale.title: Scale
scale.desc: Improve quality, latency, and cost over time. Add new workflows safely with regression testing and feedback loops.

qualitySafety.title: Quality & safety
bullets: Regression tests for prompts and retrieval

pilotCTA.title: Let’s define a pilot for your team.
pilotCTA.desc: Share your use-case and we’ll map scope, data, and success metrics before committing to build.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Clear answers about timelines, data, privacy, and how we ship reliable AI systems.
faq.respondRecommendations: We’ll respond with practical recommendations and a proposed pilot plan.

sideNeed.q: What do you need from our side?
sideNeed.a: A point of contact, access to relevant data sources, and a clear success metric. We handle the rest.

privateData.q: Can you work with private data?
privateData.a: Yes. We design with least-privilege access, strong isolation, and clear retention rules.

measureQuality.a: We define eval sets and run regression tests so improvements are measurable and repeatable.

deploymentMonitoring.q: Do you support deployment and monitoring?
deploymentMonitoring.a: Yes. We ship production setups with logging, feedback loops, and cost controls.

engagement.q: What does a typical engagement look like?
engagement.a: We start with discovery, ship a prototype, and then harden it for production with evals, guardrails, and monitoring.

privateSensitive.q: Can you work with private or sensitive data?
privateSensitive.a: Yes. We follow least-privilege access, clear retention rules, and strong isolation. We can also support on-prem or VPC setups depending on your needs.

llmQuality.q: How do you measure quality for LLM systems?
llmQuality.a: We define evaluation datasets and run regression tests so changes are measurable and repeatable over time.

maintainAfterLaunch.q: Do you build and maintain the system after launch?
maintainAfterLaunch.a: Yes. We can support deployment, monitoring, and iterative improvements—or hand off to your team with documentation and training.

toolsStacks.q: What tools and stacks do you support?
toolsStacks.a: We work with modern web stacks, cloud platforms, vector databases, and LLM providers. We choose based on your constraints and security needs.

controlCost.a: We optimize prompts and retrieval, cache where possible, set budgets and alerts, and measure cost per successful outcome.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.description: Share what you're trying to improve. We'll propose a concrete pilot with timeline, risks, and success metrics.

sendMessage.title: Send a message
sendMessage.desc: We usually reply within 1–2 business days.

form.whatBuildingPlaceholder: Tell us about your use-case, timeline, and what success looks like...

privacy.subtitle: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.legalNote: Note: This page is a general template and should be reviewed by legal counsel for your specific business and jurisdiction.

collection.title: Information we collect
items: Contact details you provide (name, email, company).
Basic analytics (device, pages visited) if enabled.

usage.title: How we use information
items: To respond to inquiries and provide requested services.
To improve the website and user experience.
To maintain security and prevent abuse.

sharing.title: Sharing
items: We do not sell personal information.
We may share with service providers (hosting, analytics) as needed to operate the site.
We may disclose if required by law.

retention.title: Retention
items: We keep data only as long as needed for the purposes above.
You can request deletion of your information.

terms.subtitle: Terms
terms.title: Terms of service
terms.legalNote: Note: This page is a general template and should be reviewed by legal counsel for your specific business and jurisdiction.

use.title: Use of the website
items: Do not misuse the site or attempt to disrupt service.
Content is provided “as is” without warranties.

ip.title: Intellectual property

You may not copy or redistribute content without permission.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
items: We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from site use.

changes.title: Changes
items: We may update these terms from time to time. The updated date will be shown above.

contact.title: Contact
items: For questions about these terms, email: hello@orfeo-ai.com
